response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, exposure to agentic workflows via MCP tooling, and a proven track record in distributed systems and open-source architecture, but lacks explicit evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams of 30+, or designing financial risk/credit systems — key requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic frameworks (MCP) and event-driven systems
Proven ability to build and scale distributed, high-throughput systems (e.g., microservices at Dunnhumby)
Strong open-source leadership and technical communication via workshops and public projects
concerns: No clear evidence of leading AI systems in regulated fintech or financial risk domains
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
No mention of real-time credit risk, working capital, or compliance infrastructure — core to the role
